ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccine_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., mRNA, viral vector) */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Annual production capacity of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_rollout_phases" (
  "rollout_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine rollout phase */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "rollout_phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine rollout phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine rollout phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rollout phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rollout phase */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the phase (e.g., healthcare workers, elderly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rollout_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "geographic_area" INTEGER /* Geographic area of the province in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "vaccination_priority" TEXT /* Priority level for vaccination (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine administration record */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "rollout_phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine rollout phase */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "total_number_first_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of first doses administered */,
  "total_number_second_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of second doses administered */,
  "total_number_booster_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of booster doses administered */,
  "total_number_vaccines_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines administered */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date when the vaccine was administered */,
  "administered_by_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who administered the vaccine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the vaccine was administered (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "side_effects_reported" INTEGER /* Number of side effects reported after administration */,
  "vaccine_lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the vaccine batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_rollout_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("rollout_phase_id") REFERENCES vaccine_rollout_phases ("rollout_phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES vaccine_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine distribution record */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "total_number_vaccines_distributed" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccine was distributed */,
  "distribution_center" TEXT /* Name of the distribution center */,
  "vaccine_lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the vaccine batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distribution_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distribution_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES vaccine_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_administration_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine administration record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "administered_by_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who administered the vaccine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  "vaccine_lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the vaccine batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_log_administration_id FOREIGN KEY ("administration_id") REFERENCES vaccine_administration ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_log_administered_by_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, healthcare provider) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., vaccine administration, distribution) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the report was requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data exchange record */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date of the data exchange */,
  "exchange_data" TEXT /* Data exchanged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data exchange (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exchanged data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)
